steps: Submit formal reclaim to BNP Paribas Securities for EUR 3,744.00 overpayment on TotalEnergies SE dividend citing FR-NO treaty 15% rate
Provide documentation showing 320,000 shares x 0.78 EUR with correct 15% withholding should yield EUR 212,160 net
Reference FR-NO tax treaty Article 10 limiting dividend withholding to 15% for qualifying Norwegian tax residents
Request BNP Paribas process refund within 30 days with interest if applicable under their custody agreement
